question: Completes syllabus of the course on time?
Scheduled organization of assignments, class test, quizzes and seminars?
While Teaching whether he/she uses multimedia tools ( PPT, Video, etc)?
Skill of linking subject to life experience & creating interest in the subject?
Whether he/she uses simulation software/ tools to explain concepts?
Refers to latest developments in the subject?
Helps students in realizing career goals?
Whether he/she promotes discussion environment in the form of question answer in the classroom?
